历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4282 → 5663 → 13605 → 12190 → 13601. There was a significant backward shift from 2021 to 2023, a brief forward shift in 2024, and a rebound to 13601 in 2025, with drastic fluctuations. The baseline is approximately 13601. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 27 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 31 in 2024, and 28 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 28, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; reputation was relatively positive in 2025 (Journalism and Communication A++ rating); reputation was relatively negative in 2026 (dormitory fire incident), but overall attention remains high; Douyin popularity ranking 11th (high heat); Journalism and Communication is A+, directly related to majors in the Physics Category such as Journalism (Journalism and Public Opinion Direction) and Communication (Intelligent and Computational Communication Direction); majors like Computer Science and Technology and Digital Media Technology, though not independently A-rated, are competitive due to the university's media industry characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, driving up overall application heat for the Physics Category; the provincial Physics Category examinee count for 2026 is approximately 143,600, roughly unchanged from 2025; the provincial control line for the 2025 undergraduate batch is 367 points (basically unchanged from 368 in 2024); Communication University of China is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Liaoning examinees; the university's enrollment share in Liaoning is about 2%–3%.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 13601, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, sustained high heat for Computer/Electronic Information majors (intensifying competition), and stable examinee numbers, the estimated minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 13651, with a range of 13151–14151.
